back_translation: Does any one among you who has a dispute with another dare to go to court before the unrighteous, instead of before the holy ones?
Or do you all not know that the holy ones will judge the world? And if you all will judge the world, will you not be qualified to settle small matters?
Do you all not know that we will judge angels? How much greater the matters of everyday life?
Therefore, if you all have lawsuits about everyday matters, do you appoint as judges among yourselves people whom the church despises?
I say this to make you ashamed. Among you all, is there not even one person who has wisdom enough to act as judge between his brothers?
But on the contrary, brother goes to court to file lawsuit against brother — and even before non-believers!
The very fact that you all have legal cases among yourselves is already a complete defeat for you. Why do you not rather submit to being wronged? Why do you not rather submit to being defrauded?
But on the contrary, you yourselves are the ones doing wrong and defrauding — and yet doing it to brothers!

Or do you all not know that the unrighteous will not inherit the kingdom of God? Do not be deceived: those who commit sexual immorality, those who worship idols, those who commit adultery, men who submit to sexual relations with men, men who have sexual relations with men —
thieves, the greedy, drunkards, those who revile, robbers — these people will not inherit the kingdom of God.

And some of you all once were like this. But you all received washing-cleansing, you received sanctification-being-made-holy, you received being-counted-righteous — in the (royal) name of the Lord Jesus Christ, and by the Spirit of our God.
"I can do anything at all" — but not everything is beneficial. "I can do anything at all" — but I will not allow myself to fall under the power of any thing.

"Food is for the stomach, and the stomach is for food" — but God will (royally) cause both to come to nothing. As for the body, it is not for sexual immorality, but for the (royal) Lord; and the Lord is for the body.
God has (royally) raised up the Lord from the dead, and will (royally) raise us up also by His power.
Do you all not know that your bodies are members of Christ? Therefore, shall I take members of Christ and make them members of a prostitute? There is no way that this could be!
Or do you all not know that one who joins himself with a prostitute is one body together with her? Because there is a written word: "The two will become one flesh."
But the one who joins himself with the Lord is one spirit together with Him.
Flee from sexual immorality. Every other sin which a person might commit is outside of the body; but the one who commits sexual immorality sins against his own body.
Or do you all not know that your body is a temple of the Holy Spirit who (royally) dwells in you, whom you all received from God? And you are not your own.
For you all received (royal) redemption at a high price. Therefore, give honor to God by means of your body.
